authority: Upstream creative handoff §4 (design-audit finding: ingredients without register produced rejected 'sterile' work). Doctrine > tokens.json > this file for values; for COMPOSITION this file is law.
enforcement: register/press-check.js — executable DOM audit of these rules + doctrine/legibility floors; work presented as official $DeFlock ships only on PASS (rule IDs match the checklists)

expressive.summary: Content artifacts. The register rules below are REQUIRED — an artifact that satisfies every token but no register rule is off-brand (the proven failure class).

ui.summary: Website UI stays disciplined so the loud pieces stay loud: type straight (tilt only on stamp-class accents: badges, active nav, one accent button per view), halftone alpha at the .10 floor, grain at .05, red rationed to focus/stamp/kicker hits, misregistration on display type only.

rules.name: tilt-default
rules.statement: Tilt is the default posture for expressive artifacts: at least 2 rotated elements with OPPOSING signs. Axis-locked compositions are off-brand.

params.uiException: UI mode: tilt lives only on stamp-class elements (badge, active nav ring, accent button), one sign per view is acceptable

rules.name: occlusion
rules.statement: One element must overlap the frame border or the type: sticker-slap, stamp straddling an edge, polaroid over a torn edge. Occlusion signals hand-assembly.

params.never: occlude the disclaimer wording, the ticker, or camera anatomy

rules.name: figurative-element
rules.statement: Every expressive artifact carries at least one figurative element: murmuration (motif-sweep/motif-cloud), breakthrough emblem, escapee birds, camera subject. Abstract decoration (swooshes, gradients) carries no meaning here.

rules.name: avatar-as-hero
rules.statement: The human is the hero on personal artifacts: the sharer's avatar/handle runs prominent (polaroid-slap or ring-break treatment), never reduced to a glyph.

params.avatarMinShare: avatar or handle among the 2 largest elements
params.never: avatar as favicon-scale glyph in a corner

rules.name: case-follows-speech-act
rules.statement: Uppercase slam is the watchdog voice (aimed at the surveilled: THEY MAP YOUR PLATES). First-person pledges run sentence case with misregistration (i put my town on the map). Both are brand-true; the speech act decides.

rules.name: expressive-ui-split
rules.statement: R1-R4 are requirements for CONTENT artifacts and violations for body-level UI. A data table at -2deg is as off-brand as an axis-locked poster.

legibilityFloors.slamShareOfFrame: slam line >= 8% of frame height at feed scale

share-card: C1 doctrine: cameras intact; no invented amounts (operator-verified numbers only); disclaimer wording exact; no other URLs; no emdashes
C2 plates only: paper/ink/red (+gadsden ONLY if DONT TREAD lineage); never pure black; never red type on ink
R2 >=1 occlusion (stamp straddle / sticker-slap / polaroid over torn edge)
R4 avatar/handle among the 2 largest elements
R5 case matches speech act (watchdog=upper, pledge=sentence+misreg)
L slam >=8% frame height; ticker unbroken on one line; meta >=16px at 1080
T texture inside budgets: halftone alpha .10-.16, grain .05-.08, misreg .045em display-only
poster: C1 doctrine (as share-card C1); stickers/posters carry disclaimer per footer law
C2 plates only; red <15% of frame, 1-2 hits
R1 R2 R3 required; R4 n/a unless personal
L slam floors per tokens.json.type; safe margin 4.5% short side
P print path: alpha converts to 9px-pitch dots (Print Specs §06); no CMYK, no gradients, no tints-as-fills
sticker: C1 doctrine; NO URL at all (operator rule), disclaimer included
C2 plates; die-cut 3in nominal, 1/16in bleed, 300 PPI
L type floors at print scale; ticker never broken
x-post: C2 plates; LOUD MODE red flood only via X Templates §10, itself rationed
R1 R2 R3 required; R4 when the post is personal
L slam >=8% frame height at feed scale; endcard holds >=1.5s on video
ui-screen: C1 doctrine: real data only (fixtures are frozen real data); disclaimer footer present; ticker one line
C2 plates via semantic tokens only — no raw hexes in component CSS
R6 discipline: no tilt outside stamp-class elements; texture at UI budget; misreg on page-title display type only
A focus-visible ring on every interactive element; tap targets >=44px; prefers-reduced-motion collapses transitions to CUT

K contrast: ink/paper 16.2:1 anywhere; red type is large-text-only (4.2:1) => >=24px or >=18.66px bold, else ink type + red non-text accent; paper on red same floor; NEVER red type on ink (plate law; 3.9:1); gadsden carries ink text only (paper on gadsden 1.6:1 banned)
H states: hover = hard-shadow lift (translate -1px,-1px + --df-shadow-hover); press = scale(0.96) 120ms ease-out; disabled = opacity .55 + cursor

voiceRef: tokens.json voice + footer + ticker (declarative watchdog; puns are seasoning; · or periods; sanctioned sounds only)
misregDirection: red offsets DOWN-RIGHT (.045em .03em) per tokens.json. The share-card route's up-left offset is recorded drift, not precedent.
